================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 D8 2E BC 8D 4A
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1865
Reflected CC   : 0x5A
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 25

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1865
ReflectedCC  : 0x5A
PayloadLen   : 25

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1865

[PAYLOAD HEX]
A3 2C F0 69 00 08 AF 2F FD EC 7A 44 F7 D9 9B 43 
92 35 7B 44 F3 00 11 C5 0F 

[RETURN VALUE]
A3 2C F0 69 00 08 AF 2F FD EC 7A 44 F7 D9 9B 43 
92 35 7B 44 F3 00 11 C5 0F
